components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard wallet connection and action button.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #5ed29c; color: #070b0a; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 1.1rem 2.2rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(94, 210, 156, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4ec28c; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(94, 210, 156, 0.35); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Card
components.description: Unified glass panel with double-mask sharp border.
components.html:
[ GB-TEE ]

TEE-Enforced Execution

Programmatic matching shielded from human eyes inside attested Intel SGX enclaves.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { position: relative; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius: 24px; padding: 2.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; width: 300px; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-glass-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 24px; padding: 1.4px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 100%); -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0); -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude; pointer-events: none; } .ds-tag { font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; color: #5ed29c; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-title { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.25rem; margin: 0; color: #ffffff; } .ds-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: GhostBroker is an institutional dark pool observatory interface. The design system is constructed to convey absolute security, confidentiality, and machine-attested authority. It rejects typical neon-slop consumer crypto widgets, SaaS-blue layouts, and multi-colored grid cards in favor of a clean, highly structured, dark glassmorphic design.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, monochromatic foundations with clean emerald green (#5ed29c) indicators.
Double-mask composited glassmorphic border elements providing depth.
Clear typographic separation of displays (Cinzel), body copy (Plus Jakarta Sans), and cryptographic data (Share Tech Mono).

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Emerald green is used strictly for successful cryptographic attestation or key CTA states. It must never exceed 10% of any visible screen surface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All layouts rest flat on the background with 12px backdrop blur. Elevation is shown only via high-contrast border states on hover, rather than traditional drop shadows.

dos: Do wrap primary blocks in glassmorphic .card selectors to ensure unified backdrop blurs.
Do format all cryptographically secure/sensitive data columns using the monospace Share Tech Mono font.
Do preserve the 'Zero Human Access' TEE secure enclave disclaimer in compliance boundaries.
donts: Don't add colored left-stripe or right-stripe borders as card accents.
Don't use neon gradient text for numbers or telemetry fields.
Don't use standard SaaS-blue grids or cards.
